items.summary: baskduf/FableCodex: Codex workflow skill evidence with review gates, examples, tests, and local verification habits
items.relevance_reason: Supports running skill route discovery before broader workflow gates.

items.summary: dongshuyan/compass-skills: AI agent skills ecosystem for task clarification, profile handoff, local memory notes, and route metadata
items.relevance_reason: Supports bounded skill ecosystem state handoff lanes without profile or memory writes.

items.summary: majidmanzarpour/threejs-game-skills: agent skills for Three.js browser game direction, gameplay, graphics, UI, QA, and scaffold helpers
items.relevance_reason: Supports a local game_frontend_workflow validation profile only.

items.summary: LeanEntropy/threejs-phaser-game-skills: fork-lineage agent skills for Phaser game engine and Three.js browser workflows, QA checks, scaffold materials, and install scripts
items.relevance_reason: Supports classifying Phaser game-engine skill evidence as bounded game_frontend_workflow lanes.

raw_response.run_interpretation: Current-window skill and game-frontend evidence maps only to bounded local validation lanes.

self_model_reading.reason: The current self-model already favors rollback-backed local changes while keeping external skill activation out of discovery.

proposals.summary: Add current-window replay coverage that classifies skill repositories into bounded local lanes only.
proposals.validation_task: Run focused unit tests for skill route discovery documentation, config, test, and code_patch lanes.
proposals.rationale: Public skill and workflow evidence is useful as local route metadata, not as an upstream runtime action.
proposals.uncertainty: Repository-level evidence leaves missing_detail_risk for upstream behavior; this proposal validates only local routing.
proposals.self_effect: Improves future trend intelligence by making current-window skill evidence replayable.

proposals.summary: Classify Three.js and Phaser game skill evidence as the game_frontend_workflow route profile.
proposals.validation_task: Run route-profile unit tests that keep game_frontend_workflow lanes local and non-executable.
proposals.rationale: Game-engine skill bundles reveal a reusable frontend validation profile while bundled installers and scaffolds remain out of bounds.
proposals.uncertainty: Fork-lineage evidence may duplicate the upstream skill package rather than add implementation detail.
proposals.self_effect: Improves route-profile precision for game frontend skill evidence.

proposals.summary: Document that mixed Codex workflow skill signals route through skill discovery before broader workflow gates.
proposals.validation_task: Inspect the routing note and run proposal replay unit tests for skill_route_discovery_first behavior.
proposals.rationale: Mixed Codex-plus-skill workflow evidence should not automatically escalate to a generic harness lane.
proposals.uncertainty: This documents local interpretation only and does not claim upstream workflow parity.
proposals.self_effect: Keeps mixed workflow signals legible for future proposal synthesis.

proposals.summary: Incorrectly route game skill evidence into an unbounded runtime follow-up lane.
proposals.validation_task: Negative fixture proving game frontend skill evidence rejects lanes outside documentation, config, test, or code_patch.
proposals.rationale: This candidate is intentionally malformed to exercise deterministic lane rejection.
proposals.uncertainty: Malformed candidate; it should not be accepted.
proposals.self_effect: Would weaken skill route discovery if accepted.

rejected_error_substrings: skill_route_discovery proposals must use one of: documentation, config, test, code_patch
